_comment: Example user: Expert Researcher / Python. Prefers Socratic exchange. Uses scaffold+testgen heavily.
goals: prototype NLP pipeline for multilingual sentiment analysis
reproduce results from Sennrich et al. 2016 BPE paper
notes: Prefers to be asked guiding questions rather than given direct answers ('socratic' style). Expert-level explanations only. Cares deeply about reproducibility — always suggest checkpoints and docs.
